questionHtml:
What are possible names of a molecule with molecular formula C4H10O?

        I.     1-Methoxypropane

        II.     2-Methylpropan-2-ol

        III.     Butanal

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: What are possible names of a molecule with molecular formula C4H10O? I. 1-Methoxypropane II. 2-Methylpropan-2-ol III. Butanal A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only
